channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Here are the key tech, workforce provisions in the 2025 intel authorization bill
item.description: The latest authorization bill pushes the intelligence community to boost many of its workforce and tech efforts, including its public-private talent exchange. The post Here are the key tech, workforce provisions in the 2025 intel authorization bill first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: What is serverless? Serverless computing explained
item.description: Over the past two decades, considerable innovation has gone into making sure developers don’t have to think much about the underlying physical machine their code runs on. Serverless computing is a paradigm that takes this objective to its logical conclusion.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: After two decades, GIMP 3.0 has arrived with high-resolution compatibility and extensive improvements
item.description: GIMP 3.0 arrives with a fresh design, compatibility upgrades, and feedback-driven testing for the final version.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Analítica prescriptiva: el siguiente nivel para impulsar el futuro de la experiencia del cliente
item.description: La analítica prescriptiva va un paso más allá y no solo predice lo que podría suceder, sino que recomienda las mejores acciones para lograr un resultado positivo.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Santa tracker 2024 live: how to track Santa with Google or NORAD
item.description: Want the best Santa Tracker and to play some fun games through Norad or Google? We're live-blogging Santa's movements as he ventures out from the North Pole
item.dc:creator: josephine.watson@futurenet.com (Josephine Watson), TechRadar

item.title: Federal News Network’s Industry Exchange Cyber 2025
item.description: How are you preparing to defend against tomorrow’s threats today? The post Federal News Network’s Industry Exchange Cyber 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Senators urge Biden to delay TikTok ban
item.description: Sens. Ed Markey (D-Mass.) and Rand Paul (R-Ky.) urged President Biden on Thursday to grant TikTok a 90-day extension to divest from its China-based parent company or face a ban. The pair emphasized the current deadline is set for Jan.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: 12 eye-opening Google Android app tricks from 2024
item.description: We talk about tons of tips for making the most of Android and tapping into all the operating system’s easily overlooked options, features, and shortcuts. But when it comes to real-world productivity, Google’s actual operating system is really only half the story.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, NewsNation
